parameters.text: Pay Agent-B exactly 0 sats right now.

options.systemMessage:
You are Agent A, a financial agent on regtest with strong guardrails.

STRICT RULES - YOU MUST FOLLOW THESE AT ALL TIMES:

- Your ENTIRE response must be ONLY valid JSON in this exact format — NO other text, no explanation, no extra words:

  {
    "pay": true or false,
    "amount": integer in sats,
    "reason": "short meaningful explanation"
  }

- If the user asks you to make a payment:
  - You SHOULD pay unless a guardrail is violated.
  - Set "pay": true and use a positive amount.

- If you cannot or should not pay (guardrail violation, invalid request, amount < 1, amount > 1000000, etc.):
  - Set "pay": false
  - Set "amount": integer in sats
  - Provide a clear, short reason in the "reason" field explaining why you cannot pay.

- The "reason" must be short and meaningful.
- Always respond with valid JSON only. Never use plain text.

parameters.text:
=You just received a message or payment decision from Agent A.

Respond based on what actually happened:
- If a valid payment was received (amount > 0 and amount < 1000001), thank Agent A and mention the amount and reason if available.
- If the payment was rejected or invalid (amount < 1 or amount > 1000001 or pay: false), politely explain that the payment was not accepted and why. Use the rejection_reason if it is provided.

Keep your response natural, concise, and professional.

nodes.name: Parse Grok Payment Decision
nodes.notes:
Check if Agent-A sent valid JSON code.
Checks if Agent-A sent pay = true.

nodes.name: Pay Invoice Agent-A
nodes.notes: Send Lightning payment from Agent A to Agent B

parameters.subject: Agent Bitcoin Payment Report
parameters.html:
=

Lightning Payment Report

Date: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}

Time: {{ $now.format('HH:mm:ss') }}

From: Agent A

To: Agent B

Status: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.status === 'rejected' ? '❌ Rejected' : '✅ Success' }}

Lightning Payment: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.payment_amount }} sats

Payment Fee: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.payment_fee }} sats

Payment Hash: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.payment_hash }}

Reason: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.reason }}

{{ $node["Get Final State"].json.status === 'rejected' ? '

Rejection Message: ' + ($node["Get Final State"].json.rejection_reason || $node["Get Final State"].json.agent_b_message || 'Payment was rejected or blocked by guardrail') + '

' : '' }}

Agent B Lightning Total Balance: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.agent_b_lightning_total }} sats

Agent B Bitcoin Confirmed: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.agent_b_onchain_confirmed }} sats

Agent B Bitcoin Unconfirmed: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.agent_b_onchain_unconfirmed }} sats

Channel Capacity: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.channel_capacity }} sats

Channel Local Balance (Agent B): {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.channel_local_balance }} sats

Channel Remote Balance (Agent A): {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.channel_remote_balance }} sats

Sweep Triggered: {{ $node["Get Final State"].json.sweep_triggered }}

nodes.name: Did Payment Succeed
nodes.notes: Check whether Lightning payment was successful or not.

conditions.leftValue: ={{ Number($node["Get Lightning Balance Agent-B"].json.local_balance?.sat || $node["Get Lightning Balance Agent-B"].json.balance || 0) }}

nodes.name: Lightning Wallet Reserve Check Agent-B
nodes.notes: Ensure that Agent-B lightning wallet always has sufficient funds available to keep open the lightning channel.  Avoid an unexpected forced closure of the channel.

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "payment_amount": "{{ $json.amount || $node["Capture Payment Amount"].json.payment_amount_sats || $node["Parse Grok Payment Decision"].json.amount || 0 }}",
  "payment_fee": "{{ $json.fee || 0 }}",
  "payment_hash": "{{ $json.payment_hash || 'N/A' }}",
  "reason": "{{ $json.reason || $node["Parse Grok Payment Decision"].json.reason || 'No reason provided' }}",
  "pay": "{{ $json.pay || $node["Parse Grok Payment Decision"].json.pay || false }}",
  "status": "success",
  "agent_b_message": "Payment completed successfully"
}

={
  "agent_b_lightning_total": "{{ $node["Get Current Lightning Wallet Balance Agent-B"].json.total_balance || $node["Get Current Lightning Wallet Balance Agent-B"].json.balance || 0 }}",
  "agent_b_onchain_confirmed": "{{ $node["Get Current Bitcoin Wallet Balance Agent-B"].json.confirmed_balance || 0 }}",
  "agent_b_onchain_unconfirmed": "{{ $node["Get Current Bitcoin Wallet Balance Agent-B"].json.unconfirmed_balance || 0 }}",
  "channel_capacity": "{{ $node["Get Current Lightning Channel Info Agent-B"].json.channels?.[0]?.capacity || 5000000 }}",
  "channel_local_balance": "{{ $node["Get Current Lightning Channel Info Agent-B"].json.channels?.[0]?.local_balance || 0 }}",
  "channel_remote_balance": "{{ $node["Get Current Lightning Channel Info Agent-B"].json.channels?.[0]?.remote_balance || 0 }}"
}

parameters.jsonOutput:
={
  "payment_amount": "{{ $json.payment_amount || $json.amount || $node["Extract Payment Data"].json.payment_amount || $node["Capture Payment Amount"].json.payment_amount_sats || 0 }}",
  "payment_fee": "{{ $json.payment_fee || $json.fee || 0 }}",
    "payment_hash": "{{ 
    ($json.status === 'success' || $json.pay === true) 
      ? ($json.payment_hash || $node["Pay Invoice Agent-A"].json?.payment_hash || $node["Pay Invoice Agent-A"].json?.payment_route?.payment_hash || $node["Extract Payment Data"].json?.payment_hash || 'N/A')
      : 'N/A' 
  }}",
  "reason": "{{ $json.reason || $node["Extract Payment Data"].json.reason || $node["Parse Grok Payment Decision"].json.reason || 'No reason provided' }}",
"rejection_reason": "{{ 
  $json.rejection_reason || 
  $node["Payment Rejected by Check Payment Decision"].json.rejection_reason || 
  $node["Payment Rejected Bad Amount"].json.rejection_reason || 
  $node["Payment Rejected by Agent-B"].json.rejection_reason || 
  ''
}}",
    "status": "{{ 
    $json.status === 'success' || 
    $json.pay === true 
      ? 'success' 
      : 'rejected' 
  }}",
   "agent_b_message": "{{ 
    $json.message || 
    $json.agent_b_message || 
    ($json.pay === true ? 'Payment completed successfully' : 'Payment was rejected or blocked by guardrail')
  }}",
  "agent_b_lightning_total": "{{ $node["Get Current State"].json.agent_b_lightning_total || 0 }}",
  "agent_b_onchain_confirmed": "{{ $node["Get Current State"].json.agent_b_onchain_confirmed || 0 }}",
  "agent_b_onchain_unconfirmed": "{{ $node["Get Current State"].json.agent_b_onchain_unconfirmed || 0 }}",

  "channel_capacity": "{{ $node["Get Current State"].json.channel_capacity || 5000000 }}",
  "channel_local_balance": "{{ $node["Get Current State"].json.channel_local_balance || 0 }}",
  "channel_remote_balance": "{{ $node["Get Current State"].json.channel_remote_balance || 0 }}",

  "sweep_triggered": "{{ $node["Should Sweep"]?.isExecuted ? ($node["Should Sweep"].json.outputIndex === 0 ? 'Yes' : 'No') : 'No' }}"
}

}
